mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inquiry_table
AND category = #{category}
mapper.update: UPDATE inquiry_table SET admin_reply = #{admin_reply}, status = 1, reply_date = sysdate WHERE inquiry_id = #{inquiry_id}
mapper.select: SELECT faq_id, admin_id, question, answer, category, order_no, visible, faqRegDate FROM faq_table ORDER BY order_no ASC, faqRegDate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO faq_table (faq_id, admin_id, question, answer, category, order_no, visible, faqRegDate) VALUES (faq_seq.nextval, #{admin_id}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{category}, #{order_no}, #{visible}, sysdate)
